channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Debate emerges over whether modern protections could have saved Baltimore bridge
item.description: When a 900-foot container ship struck the San Francisco–Oakland Bay Bridge in 2007, the span stood firm and no one died, either on the ship or the highway above. The bridge's supports were protected by a fendering system of concrete and other materials that was installed to absorb such strikes.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dutch hyperloop center aims to advance futuristic transport technology
item.description: VEENDAM, Netherlands (AP) — A 420-meter (quarter-mile) white steel tube running alongside a railway line in the windswept northern Netherlands could usher in a new era in the transportation of people and freight.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CORDER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dutch hyperloop center aims to advance futuristic transport technology
item.description: VEENDAM, Netherlands (AP) — A 420-meter (quarter-mile) white steel tube running alongside a railway line in the windswept northern Netherlands could usher in a new era in the transportation of people and freight.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CORDER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US and UK go after Chinese hackers accused of state-backed operation against politicians, dissidents
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Hackers linked to the Chinese government launched a sweeping, state-backed operation that targeted U.S. officials, journalists, corporations, pro-democracy activists and the U.K.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI and ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida's DeSantis signs one of the country's most restrictive social media bans for minors
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida will have one of the country's most restrictive social media bans for minors — if it withstands expected legal challenges — under a bill signed by Republican Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis on Monday.
item.dc:creator: BRENDAN FARRINGTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tired of AI doomsday tropes, Cohere CEO says his goal is technology that's 'additive to humanity'
item.description: Aidan Gomez can take some credit for the ‘T’ at the end of ChatGPT. He was part of a group of Google engineers who first introduced a new artificial intelligence model called a transformer. That helped set a foundation for today's generative AI boom that ChatGPT-maker OpenAI and others built upon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11
